author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Issue tree created: 13 subissues (#3-#15) under epic #2. Blocking relationships encode the 6-step dispatch plan. Prerequisites verified: ferray-core has bf16 (in dtype/mod.rs, dtype/casting.rs, dynarray.rs), ferray-linalg has LinalgFloat trait with f32+f64 impls (scalar.rs:55,84) and generic matmul (products/mod.rs:189). Dispatching Step 1: #3 core types.
